query: Giddey NO v JC Barnard void ab initio

results.title: M WvC W (2462/2019) [2022] ZANCHC 79 (19 January 2022) (Reasons)
metadata: High Court of South Africa Northern Cape, Kimberley
results.summary: Court declares earlier marriage void ab initio for non‑compliance with statutory formalities; 2013 marriage subsists; respondent’s late request for reasons not condoned.
results.topics: Family law – marriage validity – failure to complete marriage register and required Director‑General inquiry under Marriage Act renders a marriage null and void ab initio; Procedural law – Uniform Rules of Court rule 49(1)(c) peremptory; condonation under rule 27(3) required for late request for reasons; declaratory relief for nullity to ensure legal certainty.

results.title: Bester NNO and OthersvMirror Trading International (Pty) Ltd and Others (15426/2021) [2023] ZAWCHC 38 (26 April 2023)
metadata: High Court of South Africa Western Cape, Cape Town
results.summary: Court found the bitcoin investment scheme unlawful and investor contracts void ab initio, but declined insolvency-specific declarations.
results.topics: • Financial regulation/consumer protection – pyramid and ponzi schemes – CPA s 43: prohibition on pyramid schemes; • Contracts – effect of statutory illegality and s 51 CPA: agreements void ab initio; • Insolvency law – cryptocurrency (bitcoin) is movable "property" under the Insolvency Act; • Evidence/admissibility – use of s 417/418 enquiries and foreign witness material; • Civil procedure – motion proceedings and disputes of fact; when application vs trial appropriate; • Jurisdictional/novel issues – court’s power to declare illegality of internet/crypto business affecting many investors.

results.title: Camps Bay Ratepayers' and Residents' Association and AnothervHarrison and Another (560/2008) [2010] ZASCA 3 (17 February 2010)
metadata: Supreme Court of Appeal of South Africa
results.summary: Whether municipal approval of amended building plans complied with statutory building, zoning and title‑deed requirements.
results.topics: Administrative law – review of municipal building plan approval – meaning and sufficiency of building control officer’s recommendation; Building Standards Act s 7 – requirements for approval; Zoning Scheme – s 98 (façade height) and s 47 (building lines/setbacks); enforceability of restrictive title‑deed building line (clause D(d)); rider/amendment plans permissible under regulations; delay/laches in review proceedings; new grounds on appeal not entertained.

results.title: Rogal Holdings (Pty) Ltd and OthersvNaidoo and Others (2023/066197) [2025] ZAGPPHC 719 (7 July 2025)
metadata: High Court of South Africa North Gauteng, Pretoria
results.summary: Application for leave to appeal dismissed as court maintains its previous judgment regarding sale validation and party interests.
results.topics: Civil Procedure - Leave to appeal - Condonation - Criteria for appeal success - Executory contract validation.

results.title: Lutchman N.O. and OthersvAfrican Global Holdings (Pty) Ltd and Others; African Global Holdings (Pty) Ltd and OthersvLutchman N.O. and Others (1088 of 2020; 1135 of 2020) [2022] ZASCA 66 (10 May 2022)
metadata: Supreme Court of Appeal of South Africa
results.summary: A business rescue application suspends liquidation only after issue, sheriff service and prescribed notification to affected persons.
results.topics: Company law – business rescue – s 131(6) – meaning of 'application is made' – requires issue, sheriff service on company and Commission, and prescribed notification to affected persons to suspend liquidation; interpretation of consent court order – manifest purpose and context determine whether consultation/consent requirement lapsed; costs – successful respondents entitled to full costs.
